protein_name: Phosphorylates PtdIns and PtdIns4P with a preference for PtdIns. Does not phosphorylate PtdIns(4,5)P2. May be involved in EGF and PDGF signaling cascades. Belongs to the PI3/PI4-kinase family. Expressed in columnar and transitional epithelia, mononuclear cells, and ganglion cells (at protein level). Widely expressed, with highest levels in thymus and placenta and lowest in peripheral blood, skeletal muscle and kidney. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
